title: arenaria dichotoma
intro: Arenaria dichotoma, also known as sea pink or sandwort, is a low-growing, perennial plant species that thrives in coastal areas and dry, sandy soils. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Arenaria dichotoma include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce swelling, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis. Arenaria dichotoma is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or salve to apply directly to affected areas.
